buildCommand: mkdir -p apps/dashboard/data && cp -f generated/index.json apps/dashboard/data/index.json 2>/dev/null || true && cp -f generated/search-index.json apps/dashboard/data/search-index.json 2>/dev/null || true && cp -f generated/graph.json apps/dashboard/data/graph.json 2>/dev/null || true && cp -f generated/embeddings-ready.json apps/dashboard/data/embeddings-ready.json 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Vercel build: apps/dashboard/data/ refreshed'
ignoreCommand: git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- apps/dashboard/ generated/ news-dashboard-v2.html
